headline: Princess Cruises Announces 2028 World Cruise: 115-Day Global Voyage Visiting 49 Destinations Onboard Coral Princess
summary: Princess Cruises announces its spectacular 2028 World Cruise onboard Coral Princess, a 115-day, globe-spanning journey to 49 destinations across 24 countries and five continents - featuring 39 UNESCO World Heritage Sites, more overnight and late-night stays, and a maiden call to Mossel Bay, South Africa, on sale today.

headline: From Red to Green: How Trump's Iran Endgame Sparked a Wall Street Comeback
summary: Oil crashed 30% in a single session. Stagflation fears evaporated in real time. And a handful of company-specific stories made Monday one of the more memorable trading days of the year, for reasons both dramatic and surprisingly bullish.

raw.headline: From Red to Green: How Trump's Iran Endgame Sparked a Wall Street Comeback

headline: Carnival (CCL) Is Down 9.4% After Oil Shock Exposes Unhedged Fuel Costs Has The Bull Case Changed?
summary: Carnival Corporation & plc recently faced mounting cost pressures as a rapid jump in oil prices, tied to renewed conflict in the Middle East, raised concerns over fuel expenses for its global cruise operations. Because Carnival does not hedge its fuel needs, the oil shock has highlighted its greater exposure to energy price swings compared with some cruise peers. We’ll now examine how this spike in unhedged fuel costs could affect Carnival’s investment narrative around demand, margins, and...
